response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project work via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and shows no evidence of distributed systems or navigation data optimization work required for the role.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Strong track record of shipping complex systems and contributing to developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or map tile pipelines
Lack of evidence in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or navigation data consistency
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not low-latency systems or geospatial data processing
